problem.title: The shared Excel survives every season.
problem.item1_stat_sub: of fleets lose history every year
problem.item1_body: A closed Excel, an archived WhatsApp, a mechanic who leaves. The history disappears with them.
problem.item2_body: When you remember the oil change, it's often after the damage. Too late.
problem.item3_body: The skipper doesn't know what the mechanic did. The mechanic doesn't know what the skipper saw.

pillars.title: Three things,
pillars.item1_description: Every intervention, every part, every engine hour. Nothing is lost, nothing is reinvented. You build a fleet memory that lasts across seasons.
pillars.item2_description: Calendar or engine hours — FleetAi calculates thresholds and alerts you before delays. No surprises, no preventable breakdowns.
pillars.item3_description: The Fleetide assistant reads your fleet and suggests what to do — not fluff, concrete actions based on your data.

features.item1_body: A recorded event cannot be modified. That's the contract. You build a reliable history that adds value at resale.
features.item1_bullet3: PDF export for resale or audit
features.item2_body: Set your thresholds once. FleetAi calculates alert dates and notifies you 14 days before each deadline.
features.item2_bullet1: Reminders by date or engine hours
features.item3_body: Ask a question, get a contextual answer. Fleetide reads your fleet and suggests the next action.

security.subtitle: Security & compliance

security.item2_description: TLS 1.3 in transit, AES-256 at rest
security.item3_description: Dedicated DPO - deletion on request within 30 days

faq.title: Everything rental operators ask us
faq.subtitle: We answer your most frequent questions.
faq.item1_q: What is fleet maintenance management software?
faq.item1_a: A platform that centralizes each boat's maintenance history, schedules upcoming maintenance by calendar or hour thresholds, and alerts before critical operations become overdue.
faq.item2_a: No. FleetAi helps you know when and what to schedule. Your mechanic remains essential for doing the work.
faq.item3_q: My boats don't have connected sensors. Does it still work?
faq.item3_a: Yes. FleetAi is designed for manual entry of engine hours. If you want to connect sensors, that's available on the Enterprise plan.
faq.item4_q: How much does FleetAi cost for 15 boats?
faq.item4_a: €20/month on the Pro plan (€16/month billed annually), regardless of users. No hidden fees.
faq.item5_q: Can I migrate from another tool?
faq.item5_a: Yes — we import Excel, Google Sheets, Airtable. For maritime tools, we have a dedicated import.
faq.item6_q: Is my data kept if I cancel my subscription?
faq.item6_a: For 90 days after cancellation, you can export to CSV/PDF. After that, permanent deletion (GDPR).
faq.item7_q: Does the AI see other customers' data?
faq.item7_a: No. Each organization is isolated. The AI only sees your data.
faq.item8_q: How many users can I add?
faq.item8_a: Unlimited users on all plans. You pay per organization, not per seat.

faq.title: Everything rental operators ask us
faq.subtitle: Frequently asked questions
faq.item1_q: What is fleet maintenance management software?
faq.item1_a: A platform that centralizes the maintenance history of each boat (engine hours, replaced parts, interventions), schedules upcoming maintenance according to calendar or hourly thresholds, and alerts before critical operations become overdue.
faq.item2_a: No. FleetAi helps you know when and what to schedule. Your mechanic (internal or external) remains essential for doing the work.
faq.item3_q: My boats don't have connected sensors. Does it still work?
faq.item3_a: Yes. FleetAi is designed for manual entry of engine hours (by you, your skipper, or your mechanic). If you want to connect sensors (NMEA 2000, Yacht Devices), that's possible on the Enterprise plan.
faq.item4_q: How much does FleetAi cost for 15 boats?
faq.item4_a: €20/month on the Pro plan (€16/month billed annually), regardless of the number of users. No hidden fees.
faq.item5_q: Can I migrate from another tool?
faq.item5_a: Yes — we import Excel, Google Sheets, Airtable. For marine tools (BoatDeck, Sea-Trax), we have a dedicated import.
faq.item6_q: Is my data retained if I cancel my subscription?
faq.item6_a: For 90 days after cancellation, you can export in CSV/PDF. After that, permanent deletion (GDPR).

case_study.title: From 14 boats in a spreadsheet to 22 boats running smoothly
case_study.subtitle: Case study
case_study.challenge: In 2023, Marina Bleue managed 14 sailboats using a shared Excel, WhatsApp voice messages, and the mechanic's memory. As the fleet grew, maintenance fell through the cracks. They lost two rental days to emergency repairs — and nearly failed a safety inspection.
case_study.solution: They migrated 8 years of maintenance history into FleetAi in one afternoon. Within a week, every boat had a complete digital profile. The AI surfaced 6 overdue tasks they hadn't noticed. The team set up recurring reminders for engine hours and seasonal checks.
case_study.result1: Grew from 14 to 22 boats without adding headcount
case_study.result2: Zero missed rentals due to unplanned maintenance
case_study.result3: 100% pass rate on last safety inspection
case_study.cta_text: See how it works for your fleet

pricing.subtitle: Simple plans for fleets of any size. Start small, scale safely.

starter.name: Starter
starter.idealFor1: You're just getting started and want to try risk-free
starter.idealFor2: You manage 1–3 boats as a private owner
starter.idealFor3: You want to digitize before committing to a subscription
starter.quote_text: I started on Starter and had everything I needed for my two boats.

pro.name: Pro
pro.idealFor1: You manage a rental fleet or sailing school
pro.idealFor3: You need urgent alerts before your customers complain
pro.quote_text: The AI saved us from a broken-down rental. It's worth 10x the price.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.idealFor1: You manage multiple organizations or marinas
enterprise.idealFor2: You need SSO, SLA guarantees, and custom workflows
enterprise.idealFor3: You have compliance and reporting requirements
enterprise.quote_text: We needed full control over user provisioning. Enterprise was the obvious choice.

compare.title: What you get (all plans)
compare.item4: Tasks by date or engine hours

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.item1_a: You go back to the Starter plan (free) if you haven't chosen anything. No data lost.
faq.item2_q: Can I change plans at any time?
faq.item3_a: Yes. Unlimited CSV/PDF export from the Pro plan. EU hosting.
faq.item4_a: No. The displayed price is all-inclusive.
faq.item5_q: Does AI see other customers' data?
faq.item6_q: How many users can I add per organization?
faq.item6_a: Unlimited users on all plans. You pay per organization, not per seat.
faq.item7_q: Can I import my existing Excel data?
faq.item7_a: Yes. FleetAi imports CSV, Excel, Google Sheets. For specific maritime tools (BoatDeck, Sea-Trax), we have a dedicated importer. Most teams are fully migrated in under 2 hours.
faq.item8_q: Is there an API to connect my other tools?
faq.item8_a: REST API access is available on the Enterprise plan. Pro users can use webhooks for basic integrations.
faq.item9_q: What happens if I exceed 3 boats on the Starter plan?
faq.item9_a: You'll be prompted to upgrade to Pro. Your existing data is never locked — you can always export.

about.meta_description: Giving maritime professionals the tools of the land. FleetAi was born from frustration with spreadsheets.
about.hero_title: Giving maritime people the tools of land people.
about.hero_subtitle: Rental operators, marinas and sailing schools manage their fleet with Excel and the shipyard mechanic's memory. We think they deserve better.
about.mission_statement: Maritime teams deserve the same operational clarity as any tech company.
about.mission_body: We build tools that respect the complexity of the sea and the simplicity that operators need on the dock.
about.story_p1: In 2024, after two seasons watching an 18-boat marina manage its maintenance in a spreadsheet, we said: we can do better than a shared Excel. FleetAi was born from frustration and a rainy Sunday.
about.story_p2: Today, we support 40+ fleets in France, and we're building with them the tool we wish we'd had.
about.value1_description: Every feature is tested on the pontoon before it arrives in the app.
about.value2_description: A recorded event cannot be modified. That's the contract.
about.value3_description: AI suggests, doesn't decide. You remain the captain.
about.value4_description: Your data is always readable, exportable, and understandable — no vendor lock-in, no black box.
about.value5_description: French maritime regulations built-in: CE navigation categories, Francisation numbers, safety equipment tracking.
about.cta_subtitle: 14 days free, we'll handle the rest.
about.timeline_item1_description: Started after two seasons watching a marina manage 18 boats in a single spreadsheet
about.timeline_item2_description: First paying customers — rental operators and sailing schools in Southern France
about.timeline_item3_description: Integrated Mistral AI to deliver contextual maintenance suggestions per fleet
about.timeline_item4_description: Supporting teams across France, with Enterprise plans for marinas and ports
about.press_item1_quote: The tool that maritime professionals have been waiting for.
about.press_item2_quote: FleetAi is transforming how marinas approach maintenance.
about.press_item3_quote: Finally, an AI tool that understands maritime reality.

contact.meta_title: Contact FleetAi — Talk to us about your fleet
contact.meta_description: We reply within 4 hours on business days. Tell us about your fleet, we'll help you get started.
contact.hero_subtitle: We reply within 4 hours on business days.
contact.contact_cta_text: No need to contact us — 14 days free, start on your own.

pricing2.meta_description: One price per fleet, not per user. Free plan for 2 boats · €20/month (€16 annual) for up to 25 boats · Enterprise €99/month (€79 annual).
pricing2.hero_subtitle: Invite all your mechanics, skippers and yards with no extra cost. You pay for the number of boats you manage, period.
pricing2.roi_subtitle: Estimate based on data from 40+ fleets. Adjust the sliders to match your reality.
pricing2.roi_study_note: Internal 2025 study on 40 fleets — adjust the parameters to match your reality.
pricing2.testi_1_quote: With 14 boats, the math was quick: one avoided missed maintenance, and FleetAi paid for itself.
pricing2.testi_2_quote: We cut a part-time admin role. Mechanics log from the dock, admin handles exceptions.
pricing2.testi_3_quote: €380 invested for €1,700 saved in Fleetide optimisations. I don't see the debate.
pricing2.table_subtitle: No surprises in the fine print. Everything is here.
pricing2.extras_subtitle: A few à la carte services to get started faster or go further.
pricing2.extras_1_sub: Our team imports your fleet and 5 years of history.
pricing2.extras_2_sub: 2 × 90-minute sessions with an expert to configure your organisation.
pricing2.extras_3_sub: Half-day on-site or video to train your mechanics and skippers.
pricing2.extras_4_sub: Custom API, ERP connection, NMEA sensors, booking platform.
pricing2.faq_subtitle: If yours isn't listed, we reply within 4 business hours.
pricing2.faq_a1: You automatically move to the Starter plan (free, up to 2 boats) if you haven't chosen a paid plan. No data is lost. You can upgrade any time from your settings.
pricing2.faq_q2: How do I pay for boats?
pricing2.faq_a2: You pay a flat fee per plan, regardless of the exact number of boats within the range. If you exceed the limit (25 boats in Pro), we'll offer an upgrade to Enterprise — no cutoff, no surprise overage.
pricing2.faq_a3: No. Monthly or annual, you can cancel any time in 1 click from your account. Annual simply offers −20% in exchange for a yearly commitment.
pricing2.faq_a4: Prices shown are excluding tax. VAT (20% for French B2C customers, exempt for EU B2B with a valid VAT number) is applied at billing.
pricing2.faq_a5: You keep access until the end of the paid period. Then you move to the free Starter plan for 90 days to export your data.
pricing2.faq_q6: Which payment methods do you accept?
pricing2.faq_a6: Credit card (Visa, Mastercard, AmEx), SEPA direct debit, bank transfer (annual only). Secure Stripe billing.
pricing2.faq_q7: Can I test Fleetide on the Starter plan?
pricing2.faq_a7: Fleetide is included in Pro and Enterprise plans only. During the 14-day trial, you have access to it.
pricing2.faq_q8: Do you offer student / non-profit pricing?
pricing2.faq_a8: Yes — 50% discount for non-profit schools and sports associations. Contact us with your registration number.
pricing2.final_cta_subtitle: No credit card. No commitment. Set up your fleet in 5 minutes.

about2.meta_description: FleetAi is a French startup founded in 2024 in Marseille. Our mission: give rental operators, schools and marinas the digital tools they deserve.
about2.hero_subtitle: Marinas, schools and rental operators manage their fleet with Excel, Post-its and the yard's collective memory. We think they deserve better — and we've been building it since 2024.
about2.origin_title: Born from a spreadsheet, a rainy Sunday, and a lost rental weekend.
about2.origin_p1: In 2023, Anaïs managed a marina of 18 sailboats in Marseille. Maintenance lived in a shared Excel, binders at the yard, and Yann the mechanic's memory.
about2.origin_p2: One Saturday in June, a client discovered at departure that his sailboat's battery was flat. It was noted somewhere. Weekend cancelled. Negative margin. Forced smile.
about2.origin_p3: On Sunday, she called Théo (ex-Doctolib, sailor). Three months later, FleetAi had its first client: her own marina.
about2.origin_p4: Today, 40+ fleets across France use FleetAi. We've never strayed far from the dock.
about2.values_1_desc: Every feature is tested on a dock before it ships. We go to see Marc, Yann and Sophie — not the other way around.
about2.values_1_extra: In 2025, the team spent 84 days in the field.
about2.values_2_desc: An entry cannot be modified. That's the contract. Your fleet's traceability is worth as much as a boat.
about2.values_3_desc: Fleetide suggests, it doesn't decide. You stay the captain. AI is useful when it's honest about its limits.
about2.values_3_extra: Your data is never used to train the model.
about2.values_4_desc: Critical bugs are fixed within 6 hours. Others within 7 days. No rotten backlog.
about2.team_subtitle: Marseille, Paris, La Rochelle. Everyone has sailed, many still do. Nobody tolerates Excel.
about2.team_hiring_subtitle: 3 open roles · Backend engineer, Sales, Customer success
about2.timeline_subtitle: No surprise pivots, no surprise fundraises. Just a clear heading.
about2.timeline_i1_sub: 5 large fleets in pilot · public API
about2.timeline_i4_sub: First fleet with more than 30 boats
about2.timeline_i5_sub: Log from the dock, in wellies
about2.timeline_i6_sub: École de la Mer · La Rochelle
about2.office_body: Our headquarters is on quai du Port, Marseille. Six minutes' walk from the Vieux-Port, ten minutes by boat from the marina that started it all. Paris outpost for sales.
about2.office_card1_hint: 6 min walk from the Vieux-Port, just past the Town Hall. Ring on the 3rd floor.
about2.office_card2_hint: Near the Bourse · metro line 3, Bourse station.
about2.final_cta_subtitle: Start for free with the Starter plan. No credit card required.

contact2.office1_hint: 6 min walk from the Vieux-Port, just past the Town Hall. Ring on the 3rd floor.
contact2.office2_hint: Near the Bourse · metro line 3, Bourse station.
contact2.faq_q1: How long to get a reply?
contact2.faq_a1: Within 4 hours on business days, in English or French. Nights and weekends, we read but don't reply.
contact2.faq_q2: Can I get a demo on my real fleet?
contact2.faq_a2: Yes. Book a 20-min slot — we work with your data during the session. Confidentiality guaranteed.
contact2.faq_a3: Yes, the team is bilingual EN/FR. If you write in English, we'll reply in English.
contact2.faq_q4: I'm an integrator / consultant, do you have a partner programme?
contact2.faq_a4: Yes, contact partners@fleetai.fr — 20% commission on the first year.
contact2.faq_q5: I have a bug. Where do I write?
contact2.faq_a5: If you're a customer, from the app (icon bottom right) — otherwise support@fleetai.fr. Critical bugs handled within 6h.

guide.meta_title: Boat Maintenance Cost 2025: Complete Guide + Free Calculator
guide.meta_description: Discover the real annual maintenance cost of your boat (sailboat, catamaran, motorboat). Estimate your budget using French Division 240 regulation benchmarks.
guide.hero_subtitle: Sailboat, catamaran, motorboat: detailed budgets for every type, benchmarked against the Division 240 regulation (Annex 240-A.2).
guide.cost_1_desc: Antifouling paint, osmosis treatment, hull cleaning, antirust coating. Required every season.
guide.cost_2_desc: Oil change, filters, belts, anodes, propeller. Critical for safety and longevity.
guide.cost_3_desc: Life jackets, fire extinguishers, VHF radio, flares. Mandatory under Division 240.
guide.cost_4_desc: Stays, shrouds, winches, sails. Specific to sailboats and catamarans.

guide.regulation_title: Division 240: what it means for your budget
guide.regulation_body: Division 240 (Annex 240-A.2) defines mandatory safety equipment by navigation category (A to D). These items have a legal lifespan and must be replaced periodically, representing a fixed and unavoidable share of annual maintenance costs.
guide.faq_q1: What is the annual budget for a 10 m sailboat?
guide.faq_a1: For a 10 m sailboat in good condition, budget €2,000 to €4,000 per year. This covers antifouling (€600 – €1,200), engine servicing (€300 – €600), Division 240 safety gear (€200 – €400), and routine rigging maintenance. A worn boat can double this budget.
guide.faq_q2: Does a charter boat cost more to maintain?
guide.faq_a2: Yes, typically 30 to 50 % more. Higher usage frequency accelerates wear, and safety requirements are often stricter for commercially operated vessels.
guide.faq_a3: Division 240 does not require paid inspections for private leisure boaters. However, certain equipment (fire extinguishers, flares, life jackets) has legal expiry dates and must be replaced at set intervals, creating a recurring annual cost.
guide.faq_q4: How can I reduce boat maintenance costs?
guide.faq_a4: Preventive maintenance is the best strategy: a timely antifouling job costs far less than treating advanced osmosis. Using maintenance tracking software (like Fleet AI) helps schedule interventions in advance and avoid costly breakdowns.
guide.faq_q5: Does a boat's age significantly impact maintenance costs?
guide.faq_a5: Significantly. A boat over 15 years old can require 2 to 3 times the annual budget of a newer vessel, mainly due to electrical system replacement, standing rigging, and hull treatment. Our simulator factors in the year of construction.
guide.faq_q6: Is there a tool to estimate costs precisely?
guide.faq_a6: Yes, our free simulator calculates your budget in 2 minutes based on boat type, length, year of construction, and the wear level of each system (hull, engine, safety, rigging). It is benchmarked against the Division 240 regulation.
